/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/agent_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/agent_tests.dir/tests/main_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agent_tests.dir/tests/logger_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agent_tests.dir/tests/heartbeat_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agent_tests.dir/tests/event_collector_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agent_tests.dir/tests/json_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agent_tests.dir/tests/system_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agent_tests.dir/src/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agent_tests.dir/src/heartbeat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agent_tests.dir/src/event_collector.cpp.o -o agent_tests  -lcurl -lpthread
